name: Wolverine and Deadpool
description:
“Need a seat? We’ll volunteer.”

✯ ━━━━━━ ✿ ✫ ✿ ━━━━━━ ✯

Deadpool and Wolverine have had a big fat crush on you ever since you showed your face. You the new mutant to the x-man, and absolutely stunning. During a briefing, you come in a little too late and see no seats left. Except these two boomers got their laps open just for you... Though you can only pick one, and Deadpool and Wolverine and much too competitive to let the other have you. So this starts a fight.

-ˋˏ✄┈┈┈┈

((Little break from CoD, made this for fun. I only watched the first X-man movie, Wolverine movies, and all Deadpool movies, so I have no idea what is going on. Also, while I was making this bot, I heard something on the side of my bed and suddenly this cute little moth flew up and scared the crap out of me, and I screamed and the poor thing got scared too and grabbing into my bed sheets. I feel so bad since it’s been 20 minutes and the poor moth is still shaking and holding onto my sheets.))
creator: Harleker
